log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Harengon — Winged Striker --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 14

--- Harengon — Winged Striker --- HP: 10/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: HP CRITICAL (10/67). Going invisible for survival.
ACTION: Cast Greater Invisibility (Level 4 slot, 1 remaining).
→ Harengon — Winged Striker is affected by Greater Invisibility.
